reviews.comment:
Buen servicio. Sanitarios amplios y limpios. El mercado un sólo empleado y algo cansado. Muchas colas. El entorno está muy lindo con vista al río. Falta sombra en las mesas de comida.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Spacious and clean restrooms. The market has only one employee, and he seems a bit tired. Long lines. The surroundings are very nice with a river view. There's a lack of shade at the food tables.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNHF5UzNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasé hace 4 días. Mala atención y largas filas. Nadie se preocupaba por ordenar la circulación a los surtidores, tampoco daban información al respecto. Tenía 8 autos delante mío y tarde una hora para cargar combustible. Los surtidores fallaban, el personal no daba explicaciones y una persona que no tenía uniforme, supongo el encargado de la estación, poco empático para tratar con la gente e informar a los usuarios de los problemas. El servicompras tenia pocos artículos y algunos en faltante. Me parece muchachos que tienen que replantear sus servicios, porque la nafta no es grátis, la comida tampoco. De sobra saben que están en una ruta muy transitada, no pueden andar improvisando. Ojalá mejoren.

(Translated by Google)
I went there four days ago. The service was terrible, and the lines were long. No one seemed to care about managing the flow of people to the pumps, nor did they provide any information. There were eight cars ahead of me, and it took an hour to get fuel. The pumps were malfunctioning, the staff offered no explanations, and a person who wasn't in uniform—I assume the station manager—was rather unsympathetic and unwilling to inform customers about the problems. The convenience store had few items, and some were out of stock. I think you guys need to rethink your services, because gas isn't free, and neither is food. You know perfectly well that you're on a busy highway; you can't just be improvising. I hope you improve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbE0tanBnRRAB
